stemHtml: During the cruise, you are flying towards a mountain range and you experience a severe gust with a sudden loss of airspeed and altitude. What should you do?

options.a: Make a special air report because you have encountered severe moutain waves.
options.c: Only report if there is icing but do not if it is turbulence alone.
options.d: You don't make a report, pilots are not obliged to report on weather conditions.
